inputs.label: pKa
inputs.businessContext: Negative logarithm of the acid dissociation constant (Ka) of the weak acid.

businessContext_i18n.en: Negative logarithm of the acid dissociation constant (Ka) of the weak acid.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zayıf asidin asit ayrışma sabitinin (Ka) negatif logaritması.

inputs.label: Concentration of Acid (HA)
inputs.businessContext: Molar concentration of the weak acid species in the buffer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Molar concentration of the weak acid species in the buffer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tampondaki zayıf asit türünün molar konsantrasyonu.

inputs.label: Concentration of Conjugate Base (A⁻)
inputs.businessContext: Molar concentration of the conjugate base species in the buffer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Molar concentration of the conjugate base species in the buffer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tampondaki konjuge baz türünün molar konsantrasyonu.

inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of the buffer solution; ensure the provided pKa corresponds to this temperature.

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature of the buffer solution; ensure the provided pKa corresponds to this temperature.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tampon çözeltisinin sıcaklığı; sağlanan pKa'nın bu sıcaklığa karşılık geldiğinden emin olun.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
